content: CubeCL (tracel-ai) v0.10.0 (May 2026), alpha (breaking changes across minor) but production-used by Burn. Single #[cube] Rust fn JIT-compiles to CUDA/HIP/Metal/SPIR-V/WGSL/CPU; type+borrow-checked, no separate shader language. Standalone (no Burn needed). Supports atomics via &Array<Atomic<u32>> (atomic_add), shared memory, 'plane'(=warp/subgroup) intrinsics incl exclusive sum/scan, manual indexing. Uses its own runtimes; CUDA runtime built on cudarc-style driver. Windows/CUDA supported. Candle/Burn host-side tensor libs not suited to authoring irregular custom tree kernels directly. cuda-oxide (NVlabs) experimental Rust->PTX, not production.
